privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a procedurally modified version of 'SweetHome3DExample7.sh3d' downloaded from the official sample library, where all furniture has been stripped to create a vacant disaster relief shelter with 48 baseline walls and 14 baseline dimensions. The target output file is 'disaster_relief_starter.sh3d'. The expected features include dimension annotations, text labels, partition wall creation, and high-density furniture placement (>65 total items), correctly verified by parsing the XML structure of the saved SH3D archive. All metadata claims exactly match the verification scripts and constraints.
